$voiceCadence: calm, decisive — operator confidence in the platform
$revisionNote: Sandbox auth was down at capture time. Placeholder body/keypoints scenes used instead of authenticated health-page screenshots.

storyboard.voiceover: Workspace Health. Every capability RestoreAssist advertises, live-checked.

storyboard.onScreenText: Slash dashboard slash settings slash health.
storyboard.voiceover: Open slash dashboard slash settings slash health. One page, the live status of every system you depend on.
Three core capabilities you'll check most often. AI report generation. Chain-of-custody on every photo. Accounting sync across Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks.

keypoints: AI generation — last call, latency, quota.

storyboard.voiceover: Three operational checks under that. Database round-trip. Background queue depth. Outbound email delivery. All green means you can work.

storyboard.onScreenText: Amber means degraded — but still functional.
storyboard.voiceover: If a check goes amber, it's degraded — slower than usual, but still working. Red means a real outage. We tell you which, and what's affected.

data.footnote: Amber = degraded · Red = outage · always with cause.

storyboard.onScreenText: Every failing check has a one-click fix.
storyboard.voiceover: Every failing check ships with a one-click fix. Reconnect Xero. Re-attest photo. Re-run sync. No support ticket required.

keypoints: Open the support thread if it persists.

storyboard.onScreenText: RestoreAssist — Status you can verify, not promises.
storyboard.voiceover: RestoreAssist. Status you can verify, not promises. One National Inspection Standard.
